caption: In a domestic setting, a person is mixing popcorn in a large bowl. The popcorn appears to be seasoned with a green substance. The person's hand moves quickly through the bowl, tossing and stirring the popcorn across the sequence. In the bottom-left corner of each frame, there is a circular inset video featuring a woman with short blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt. The top-left corner of each frame displays the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" next to a white logo of stylized waves. The background behind the bowl and inset is a bright blue sky with white clouds. As the sequence progresses, the hand moves from the top-left towards the center and eventually sweeps across the right side of the bowl to ensure the popcorn is thoroughly mixed.
